IPTV & VOD Aggregation Ecosystem

HLS.js Adaptive Multi-Bitrate Engine Ready
4K / 1080p
🤖

AI Quantum Stream Healer

Calculates Quantum Reliability Scores (QRS) using latency, packet loss, and stability parameters to auto-repair broken streams and generate fallback mirrors.

⚡

500-Worker Verifier

High-concurrency async Sentinel verifier tests over 10,000 links per minute with SSL error resilience and host circuit breaking.

📱

Cross-Platform Apps

Flutter client for Android, Windows, macOS, Linux, and Kotlin Ktor Android Proxy service with embedded local HTTP server.

📡

EPG & Xtream Emulation

Fetches XMLTV program guides and provides Xtream Codes API emulation (`/player_api.php`) for TiviMate, OTT Navigator, and Smarters.

🛡️

Parental Lock Vault

Regex-based adult content classifier with PIN verification (`0171`) and custom encryption options for private playlist storage.

🌐

IPFS Gateway Resolver

Decentralized playlist distribution across Cloudflare, Pinata, and IPFS public gateway mirrors for maximum uptime.

ALL-IN-ONE IPTV Engine v2.1.0 · Open Source MIT Licensed Project

Maintained by ShoumikBalaSomu & Open Source Community
